purpose: Model and role routing for STWI multi-desktop-agent coordination.

source_of_truth.runtime_control_plane: Linear queue plus Symphony workspace convention; executor selected by mutually exclusive approval label

responsibilities: review every Hermes worker result before the user sees a final handoff
prepare and dispatch bounded same-ticket Hermes Rework when checks or diff review fail
stage commit push only when the user explicitly asks
bounded implementation from a Codex-authored plan
orchestrate Step workers through Hermes native tools when MCP server tools are messaging-only
must_stop_for_human_review: contract API safety or legal policy changes
secret private live-service or raw-video access
new dependency service framework or provider assumption

responsibilities: create or reuse isolated issue workspaces
prepare one bounded issue at a time by default
run Codex app-server only for codex-symphony-approved issues
remain stopped while a Hermes sidecar executor is active

integration_direction.reason: Symphony requires the Codex app-server protocol, while Hermes native oneshot is a different CLI contract. In-tenant Codex execution is the default for source code; the verified Hermes bridge is an exception only after ticket-specific informed approval for outside-tenant transmission.
integration_direction.codex_to_hermes_mcp: Use only for messaging, session observation, or handoff notes.
integration_direction.hermes_execution: Use hermes_runner_bridge.py with native Hermes oneshot prompt content and the isolated Symphony workspace as cwd.
integration_direction.codex_role: Create plans and prompts, review every Hermes diff and report, independently verify claims, dispatch bounded Rework when needed, and present only the consolidated final review to the user.
integration_direction.human_role: Final acceptance only. After user confirmation, Codex updates the ticket state and activates the next approved ticket.

allow_only_when: ticket has an explicit informed outside-tenant approval
allowed files are classified as non-secret and non-private
the packet forbids access to private data, credentials, raw video, model weights, and live services
Codex records the approval and independently reviews the output
external_code_transmission.fallback: Codex app-server with gpt-5.6-terra at medium reasoning effort

model_routes.configuration_source: Hermes config.yaml: model.default, model.provider, and agent.reasoning_effort
use_for: single-file or narrow multi-file docs update
bounded source-code implementation when Hermes/Nous export is not approved
focused tests and validation inside the existing Codex tenant
do_not_use_for: raw video, model weights, or live-service execution
automatic final acceptance, merge, or release decisions

use_for: contract API safety legal or RAG policy
do_not_use_for: large mechanical edits that can be executed from a complete plan
repeated test runs with unchanged inputs

parallel_allowed_only_when: each issue has an isolated workspace
no task touches project_contract.json API status safety legal private data or live services
each worker stops at reviewable diff
Codex reviews before user final acceptance or any merge action
concurrency_policy.current_recommended_mode: one active implementation issue until TRA-12 is reviewed and leaves Human Review
